methodology.allergens: Essential-only rule: tags applied solely when an ingredient unambiguously contains the allergen. Japanese-specific: shoyu -> Soya + Gluten (wheat); dashi/bonito -> Fish; tempura batter -> Gluten + Eggs; miso -> Soya; sesame flagged when explicit; tom yum paste -> Fish + Crustaceans due to fish sauce and shrimp paste base. No speculative tagging. Empty -> NO_ALLERGENS.
methodology.calories: USDA-style per-100g reference table applied to each ingredient converted to grams (liquids via density, eggs 50g/piece). Sub-recipe (SF) kcal computed first and pro-rated into parent dishes by grams used. Combo boxes sum component recipes by quantity. Rounded to integer. Packaging excluded. Wastage not applied.

changelog.change: Initial extraction of 72 Norii (Japanese) finished recipes + 15 semi-finished components from Matt New Menu Recipes.xlsx. Allergens and kcal enriched.

changelog.entry: Fixed Sugared drink tagging on Coca-Cola (NOR168) and Sprite (NOR170) full-sugar variants (prior regex miss).
